title: OGI Stock Earnings: OrganiGram Holdings Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q4 2023
text: OGI Q4 2023 Earnings Results. Organigram reported earnings results for its fourth quarter and fiscal 2023 ended September 30, 2023, on Tuesday, December 19, 2023, before market open. Earnings Performance: OrganiGram Holdings reported earnings per share of -7 cents, which was above the analyst estimate for EPS of -10 cents. Revenue: The company reported revenue of $34.32 million, which was 16.26% better than the analyst estimate for revenue of $29.52 million. Overall Performance: The company beat both EPS and revenue expectations for the quarter.
